business_problem: Ms-meta.HK, a Hong Kong-based decentralized Metaverse startup building a digital twin of Hong Kong, needed powerful GPU rendering for hyperrealistic scenes, high bandwidth for livestreaming, secure exposed servers, and smooth user experience under heavy concurrent access.
solution_summary: Ms-meta.HK deployed a Web3-native Metaverse platform creating a digital twin of Hong Kong's King's Road in immersive 3D, requiring intensive GPU-accelerated rendering and global content delivery. The platform ingests user interaction data, NFT metadata, and livestream content through a security-hardened infrastructure, performing real-time 3D scene rendering via Elastic GPU Service and distributing high-definition visual content through Alibaba Cloud CDN to minimize loading times. Anti-DDoS and Web Application Firewall protect user accounts and transaction integrity while Security Center provides unified threat monitoring. The architecture enables concurrent access for thousands of users with fluent scene experience.
business_outcome: Ms-meta.HK launched its Metaverse offering to the public—NFT marketplace went live August 2022, Metaverse public beta scheduled for early September 2022—with optimized virtual scenes, reduced load times, and protected publicly exposed servers.
metrics: Metaverse public beta scheduled for September 2022
architecture_clues: ECS + Elastic GPU Service for scene rendering
Security Center + Anti-DDoS + WAF for layered defense
evidence_quotes: Ms-meta.HK leveraged a variety of services by Alibaba Cloud in its solution implementation. These services, along with Alibaba Cloud's local technical experts and dedicated support team, enabled Ms-meta.HK to easily launch its Metaverse offering to the public.
Ms-meta.HK's NFT marketplace was officially launched in August 2022, and the public beta of its Metaverse is scheduled to be released in early September of 2022.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Backend services for user state, NFT transactions, and Metaverse scene orchestration

solution_components.name: Elastic GPU Service
solution_components.role: Cloud-based GPU rendering for high-definition 3D Metaverse scenes and visual processing

solution_components.name: Alibaba Cloud CDN
solution_components.role: Global content delivery for rendered scenes and assets reducing latency and loading time

solution_components.name: Security Center
solution_components.role: Unified security monitoring and threat detection for Metaverse infrastructure

solution_components.name: Anti-DDoS
solution_components.role: Network protection against distributed denial of service attacks on user access

solution_components.name: Web Application Firewall
solution_components.role: Application-layer security protecting NFT marketplace and user account systems

data_flow: User Metaverse interactions → ECS backend processing → GPU-accelerated 3D rendering → CDN distribution → immersive client experience
